channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Offline-first apps: when 2G is the fast lane
item.description: Cut duplicate transactions 99% with offline-first payments in unreliable markets — WatermelonDB 1.5.0, idempotency keys, and OS-aware sync worker. Real numbers from 1,240 merchants in Lagos, Nairobi, and Dar es Salaam.

item.title: Zero-trust on $50/month: 3 tools that actually work
item.description: Cut zero-trust setup time 70% with Tailscale + Cloudflare Tunnel — identity policies, 20ms latency, and $50/month pricing breakdown.

item.title: Failed AI wrappers vs. the 3 that worked in 2026
item.description: 4 AI wrappers survived in 2026 — latency overhead, cost delta, and model swap time data included. Use this to pick the right wrapper before burning runway.

item.title: Killed $3k K8s bill: how Fly.io saved us 94%
item.description: Cut cloud bill 94% with Fly.io — real latency drop, exact volumes, and one-engineer deployment steps for solo founders

item.title: Test AI code without testing the AI
item.description: Cut false positives 60% with 9 testing methods for AI code — no AI mocks, just real behavior. Property-based, contract, fuzz, and chaos testing explained with Python 3.11 and Node 20 LTS examples.

item.title: Trim AWS IAM policies in one afternoon
item.description: Cut AWS permission errors 87% and save 11% on your bill with least privilege IAM done in 60 minutes — CloudTrail, Access Analyzer, and a 3-step process.

item.title: IDP costs: 3 tiers, 3 playbooks
item.description: Cut platform waste 38% by limiting knobs to 7 — Micro, Growth, and Enterprise IDP playbooks with real code and cost data from 2026 systems.

item.title: Biometrics beat passwords: passkey 2026 shift
item.description: Cut failed logins 77% with passkeys — platform quirks, cost savings, and the exact code we used to roll out in 30 minutes.

item.title: 3 things I swapped out to ship HTMX in 2026
item.description: Cut dashboard payload 96% with HTMX 2.0 — no new runtime, no build step, and real numbers from Lagos to Bangalore in 2026.

item.title: Automate SBOMs before audits hit
item.description: Cut audit time 80% with Syft 1.12 SBOMs — SPDX 2.3, CycloneDX 1.5, and Cosign attestations in your Docker pipeline

item.title: Debug AI agents: failures aren't just bugs
item.description: Cut AI agent postmortem time 61% with LLM graphs — embedding drift, tool-use side effects, and the 12% false positive trap most teams miss.

item.title: 7 ways to earn extra in 2026 without shipping SaaS
item.description: Earn $500/month in 2026 without SaaS — 7

item.title: AI ate my freelance rate (2026)
item.description: Freelance rates fell 28% since 2024 — here’s how AI tools turned hours into a discount lever and how to price outcomes instead

item.title: Survive AI swipes with niche picks
item.description: Cut SaaS pivot risk 75% by targeting niches where AI can’t displace the human final authority — Kenya payroll case study with latency, cost, and licence data.

item.title: AI-proof your mid-level salary
item.description: Cut salary risk 50% with three AI-resistant skills — own the stack, measure outcomes, and automate incidents. Backed by 2026 salary data and concrete metrics.

item.title: 9 Vibe coding traps that break production code
item.description: Cut MVP build time 70% with vibe coding — but one wrong choice can cost $45k/year in hidden bills. Learn the 9 tools that break in production and how to replace them before the first alert fires.

item.title: AI pair programming: how we lost ownership at 3AM
item.description: Cut production incidents from 8 to 0 by changing how we used AI pair programming — ownership rules, audit logs, and a pre-commit hook that worked in 2026

item.title: Legacy codebases? Let AI own the boring parts
item.description: Cut legacy code review time 70% with AI — real code, real benchmarks, and the mistakes most teams repeat. Learn how to use LLMs without hallucinations or security risks.

item.title: Engineers fail AI screens: the real tests in 2026
item.description: Cut engineering interview failure rates 47% with one change: test debugging, not coding. Real Node 20 LTS and Python 3.11 examples included.

item.title: AI alert triage in 2026: PagerDuty + LLMs
item.description: Cut PagerDuty false positives 78% using AI alert triage with Claude 3.5 and Python 3.11 — the exact steps, code, and cost breakdown you need to sleep through Tuesday nights.
